---
execute:
  enabled: false
---
```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]

min_points = 10000
model_file = ""
muscle_name = ""

```

Get muscle data

```{python}
from osimpy.osim_graph import OsimGraph

graph = OsimGraph.from_file(model_file)

if muscle_name not in graph.get_muscle_names():
    raise ValueError(f"Muscle '{muscle_name}' not found in model.")

data = graph.get_all_muscle_lengths_rom(min_points=min_points)
```

Plot lengths
```{python}
#| label: fig-{muscle_name}-lengths

import plotly.graph_objects as go

fig = go.Figure(
    data=go.Parcoords(
        line=dict(color=data[muscle_name], colorscale="Viridis", showscale=True),
        dimensions=[dict(label=col, values=data[col]) for col in data.columns],
    )
)

fig.update_layout(title=f"{muscle_name} Lengths")

fig.show()

```
